personal.preferred_title: Lead Data Engineer | Cloud Data Platforms | ETL, Data Quality & Pipeline Reliability

summary: Lead Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong hands-on depth in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, PySpark, AWS data services, data warehousing, and production pipeline reliability. Built and operated large-scale telemetry and forecasting data platforms, including pipelines across 6,000+ endpoints, S3/Glue/Redshift processing, Oracle data models, automated reporting, and stakeholder-facing dashboards. Strengths include improving pipeline performance, data quality, operational visibility, cost-aware cloud processing, and translating technical roadmaps into reliable delivery across engineering and business teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable data workflows for capacity, risk, and executive reporting.
Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, and Oracle schemas to support large-scale historical analysis and forecasting workloads.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention structures to support seasonal forecasting, data reconciliation, and long-term reporting requirements.
Migrated heavy Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle processing to Redshift, enabling more scalable parallel forecasting and reducing pressure on legacy systems.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with dashboards used by senior stakeholders.

Improved data platform reliability by validating telemetry quality, identifying missing or inconsistent feeds, and surfacing capacity deviations through automated reporting and operational dashboards.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS to support scalable on-demand processing for capacity forecasting and data engineering workloads.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality systems, supporting operational visibility for revenue-impacting applications.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to produce optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing results with application performance telemetry and bottleneck analysis.
Participated in AWS migration planning by providing APM readiness assessment, mobile monitoring evaluation, and operational performance guidance.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for an enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across critical systems.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime, coordinating work across infrastructure, application, and operations teams.
Designed management modules, dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds that became standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Ksh data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing manual weekly export work and improving operational consistency.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to identify and resolve bottlenecks using APM telemetry, thread, transaction, and infrastructure signals.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while supporting transaction volume larger than VISA-scale workloads.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built a C++/OCCI/OCI validation framework to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to protect data integrity during phased migration cutover.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, sockets, and Marconi APIs for telecom-scale billing systems.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing processes by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced billing, EDI, settlement, reporting, and interface modules across the full billing lifecycle.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration using Korn Shell scripting, eliminating manual deployment steps and improving operational repeatability.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Design, Data Pipelines, Data Quality & Pipeline Validation, Data Warehousing, Dimensional Modeling, Data Governance, Reconciliation, Data Lifecycle Controls
skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Big Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Apache Parquet, Serverless Data Platforms
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, SQL Server concepts, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DB2, Data Modeling, Schema Design, Partitioning, Performance Tuning
skills.Pipeline Reliability: Automated Data Quality Reporting, Monitoring, Alerting, SLA/SLO Thinking, Incident Analysis, Root-Cause Analysis, Retry/Recovery Awareness, Operational Dashboards
skills.DevOps & Orchestration: Docker, Git, Airflow, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, EC2/ECS, Streamlit Dashboards
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, Telemetry Analysis, EUM/RUM, Transaction Tracing
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Databricks, Delta Lake, Medallion Architecture, Unity Catalog, Delta Live Tables, dbt, Snowflake, Terraform, FastAPI, AWS MSK / Kafka fundamentals, Azure cloud concepts

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns. Focused on data ingestion, transformation, columnar storage, small-file mitigation, and enterprise-scale query access.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting engine and Streamlit dashboard that replaced manual capacity forecasting workflows, improved reporting speed, and predicted bottlenecks months ahead using Prophet and scikit-learn.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring, structured data extraction, resume and cover generation, quality gates, and status tracking.
